title: YouTube Poop: Billo Wants To Get Silly
description:
Featuring two people laughing at human suffering.

My very first YouTube Poop ever. I'm so prowd. Please be kind, as this is my first one ever, and I only could use the first clip I was able to get my grubby little paws on.

Special thanks to my favorite YouTube Poopers, ApolloBoy, StegBlob, Deepercutt, and MrSimonAlt for the inspiration.
